exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hold at 70kg. 3x8 at RPE 9 last time — on cut, holding is winning.

exercises.name: Pull-Up Parallel Close Grip
exercises.notes: BW. 3x6 at RPE 10 last time. Aim for 6-7 per set. Full dead hang to chin over bar.

exercises.name: Machine Seated Row
exercises.notes: Hold at 25kg. Reps dropped 12→9→8 last time — target 10 per set to rebuild consistency.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Hold at 30kg. Reps dropped to 8 on last set — target 10 per set.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Hold at 25kg. Last session accidentally used 12-rep target — this time: 3x15. RPE 7 on final set confirms the weight is right.
